# Mystcraft: Open New Dimensions

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3nbtuLI88sw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Are you interested in exploring 7 new Minecraft dimensions, in the spirit of popular game series MYST?
The Mystcraft Data Pack adds books that allow you to teleport to these worlds and your own waypoints! Just don't forget a way back...

## About

These 7 dimensions come with their own special biomes and resources. Current dimensions are:
- Sanctuary
- Wasteland
- Sanctuary
- Blizzard
- Pocket Dimension
- Skylands
- Warrens

You can also create your own books that can teleport you to saved waypoints, last death point, and even other players. Mystcraft is even more fun with your friends and optimized to run on servers.

The gameplay guide can be accessed in-game:
`/trigger mystguide`

## Installation

To install, move the mystcraft_datapack.zip file into .minecraft/saves/YOURSAVE/datapacks

Then add the mystcraft_resources.zip into .minecraft/resourcepacks and activate it in the GUI

## Future Plans

I am continuing to add features to Mystcraft. Current plans include:

- Better structures
- More custom features for biomes
- Custom models for opened books

## Contributing

I develop Mystcraft as a hobby. If you're a developer, feel free to contribute on GitHub (Report bugs there as well) If you want to support, donate on KoFi!
